segments.text: "Dear Theophilus, [^1] in my previous book I wrote about all that Jesus did and taught from the beginning

footnotes.text: + Meaning {   "type": "speech",   "text": "One who loves God," }  either a specific person, or more generically. The  {   "type": "speech",   "text": "previous book" } mentioned is the Gospel of Luke.

segments.text: "until the day he was taken up to heaven. This was after he'd given instructions through the Holy Spirit to his chosen apostles.
"Over the course of forty days after the death he suffered, he showed himself to them, proving that he was alive with convincing evidence. He appeared to them, and told them about the kingdom of God.
"While he was still with them[^2] he instructed them,
Do not leave Jerusalem. Wait to receive what the Father promised, just as you heard it from me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

footnotes.text: + Or {   "type": "speech",   "text": "while he was sharing a meal with them." }

segments.text: It's true that John baptized in water, but in just a few days' time you will be baptized in the Holy Spirit.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: "So when the disciples met with Jesus, they asked him,
Lord, is this the time when you will re-establish Israel's kingdom?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: You don't need to know about the dates and times that are set by the Father's authority,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: he told them.
But you will be given power when the Holy Spirit comes upon you, and you will be my witnesses in Jerusalem, throughout Judea and Samaria, and to the farthest places on earth.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: "After Jesus had told them this, he was taken up as they were watching and a cloud hid him from their sight.
"While they were staring intently at the sky as he ascended, two men dressed in white were suddenly standing beside them.
Men of Galilee, why are you standing here staring at the sky?
segments.speaker: An Angel of the LORD

segments.text: they asked.
This same Jesus who has been taken up from you to heaven shall come in the same way you saw him go into heaven.
segments.speaker: An Angel of the LORD

segments.text: "Then the disciples went back to Jerusalem from the Mount of Olives which is about a Sabbath day's walk from Jerusalem. [^3]

footnotes.text: + In other words, a relatively short distance.

segments.text: "When they arrived, they went upstairs to the upper room where they were staying: Peter, John, James and Andrew; Philip and Thomas; Bartholomew and Matthew; James the son of Alphaeus, Simon the Zealot, and Judas the son of James.
"They all joined together in prayer, together with the women and Mary, Jesus' mother, and his brothers.
"At this time Peter stood up and addressed a crowd of around one hundred and twenty believers who had gathered together.
My brothers and sisters,
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: he said,
The Scriptures, spoken by the Holy Spirit through David, had to be fulfilled regarding Judas, who guided those who arrested Jesus.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: He was counted as one of us, and shared in this ministry.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: "(Judas had bought a field with his ill-gotten gains. There he fell down headfirst, and his body burst apart, spilling out all his intestines.
"Everybody who lived in Jerusalem heard about this so that the field was called in their language
Akeldama,
segments.speaker: Narrator

segments.text: which means,
Field of blood.
segments.speaker: Narrator

segments.text: "As it's written in the book of Psalms,
Let his home be abandoned, and no one live there,
segments.speaker: Psalm

segments.text: and
Let someone else take over his position.
segments.speaker: Psalm

segments.text: So now we have to choose someone who has been with us the whole time that Jesus was with us,
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: from the time John was baptizing up until the day Jesus was taken up to heaven from us. One of these must be chosen to join together with us as we witness, giving evidence of Jesus' resurrection.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: "Two names were put forward: Joseph Justus, also known as Barsabbas, and Matthias.
"They prayed together and said,
Lord, you know everyone's thoughts. [^5] Please show us which of these two you have chosen
segments.speaker: They

segments.text: to replace Judas as an apostle in this ministry that he gave up to go to where he belongs.
segments.speaker: They

segments.text: "They cast lots, and Matthias was chosen. He was counted as an apostle with the other eleven.
